_readme: Human-labeled bills for measuring AI classification accuracy. Copy this file to pipeline/eval/labels.json and replace the examples with your OWN judgment on 30-50 real bills (find their IDs in the app URL: /bills/<id>). Then run `npm run eval` to see how often the AI agrees with you. Tweak the prompt, re-summarize, and re-run to see the number move — that's how you make classification provably more correct instead of just differently-worded.

labels.notes: Expands Medicaid eligibility — clear benefit to low-income residents
Guts water-quality permitting for extractive industry
